channel.title: it's giving news
channel.description: wake up to james and anne word-vomiting the news. like a disheveled little wobbly hog sprinting to the trough, come on down, lil piggie. your daily hot and messy ai slop is served... enjoy ✨
channel.itunes:author: Reid McGill
channel.itunes:summary: wake up to james and anne word-vomiting the news. your daily hot and messy ai slop, served. ✨
channel.itunes:subtitle: A sharp morning briefing with James and Anne.

item.title: The President Flinches and Claude Returns
item.description: Topics: Walmart, Google, FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Boeing. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:summary: Topics: Walmart, Google, FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Boeing. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.content:encoded: Topics: Walmart, Google, FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Boeing. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Nvidia Earnings and the Cursor App
item.description: And the part people are underestimating is that Walmart is competing with two completely different kinds of companies for that multiple. Topics: Walmart, FAA, NASA, Nvidia, Boeing, Bombardier, Pratt & Whitney, Steelers. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:summary: And the part people are underestimating is that Walmart is competing with two completely different kinds of companies for that multiple. item.content:encoded: And the part people are underestimating is that Walmart is competing with two completely different kinds of companies for that multiple. item.title: GPT-5.6 Sol and the Nike CFO

item.title: Government Outsourcing the Brain to Anthropic
